without_skill.note: Ground truth agent — not graded against same assertions (produces reference, not evaluated)

qualitative.node_coverage: high — all 4-hop chain symbols present plus FSM state handlers and type nodes
qualitative.edge_coverage: high — call chain, produces/consumes for key types all captured
qualitative.relay_semantic: captured via symmetric produces+consumes pattern inference
qualitative.key_gap: relay:true is not a graph edge attribute — must be inferred from symmetric produce+consume pattern

qualitative.node_coverage: high — full 6-hop chain, decoder branch, sub-FSM chain all present
qualitative.maps_to_gap: LegacyEvent maps_to bridge NOT directly visible from consumer-side graph — skill correctly identified as gap
qualitative.key_gap: maps_to bridge between LegacyEvent variants requires cross-subsystem type tracing (find_type across all nodes)

qualitative.node_coverage: high — typedef chain (all 5 nodes), proto/WSDL paths, LegacyEvent_CC all present
qualitative.edge_coverage: high — typedef_of chain, serialize_proto/wsdl paths, maps_to bridge
qualitative.ptr_depth_gap: ptr_depth NOT stored on typedef edges in graph JSON — chain order implied only
qualitative.select_serializer_gap: select_serializer has no call edges to serializer functions — branch split is implicit

parser_gaps_identified.gap: relay:true not stored as edge attribute
parser_gaps_identified.impact: medium — broker relay semantics require inference from symmetric produce+consume
parser_gaps_identified.fix: Add relay boolean field to edges when parser detects broker/relay pattern

parser_gaps_identified.gap: ptr_depth not stored on typedef_of edges
parser_gaps_identified.impact: low-medium — typedef chain order implies ptr_depth but it's not explicit
parser_gaps_identified.fix: Emit ptr_depth attribute on typedef_of edges in parser_cpp.py

parser_gaps_identified.gap: select_serializer has no call edges to serializer functions
parser_gaps_identified.impact: medium — branch split in encode path is invisible in graph
parser_gaps_identified.fix: Parser should emit calls edges from select_serializer based on what it calls/returns

parser_gaps_identified.gap: maps_to bridge not visible from consumer side
parser_gaps_identified.impact: low — consumer decoder only sees RawBytes->DecodedMessage; WSDL/proto type mapping is producer-side
parser_gaps_identified.fix: Could add cross-reference edges from consumer decoder to LegacyEvent types when format detection is present
